no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... && lefthook run pre-commit
status: complete
reason: The requested rate-limit retry boundary is already centralized in cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go; execute_bead.go no longer owns Retry-After parsing, backoff selection, or the per-bead retry budget. The named acceptance tests are already present and the required package gate plus pre-commit gate both pass on this revision, so no code change was needed.
